misc: His usual shot shape could be described as a "power draw".
biography: Jussi, a familiar face at the Hector Trophée, brings a unique blend of power and finesse to the course. Representing St. Laurence Golf, Jussi is known for his aggressive style of play, most notably his signature power draw that allows him to gain significant yardage off the tee.

Though the coveted Hector Trophée and the Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Jussi has participated in the event 4 times and remains a formidable competitor, always eager to challenge the course and his fellow players. His dedication to the sport is evident in his rigorous training regime.

While Jussi is not currently slated to participate in Hector Trophée 2026, his fans remain hopeful that he may yet join the field, adding his distinctive flair to the tournament. A fierce competitor on the course and a true sportsman off it, Jussi embodies the spirit of the game.
